name: ENEM QA Tester - Local Ollama (REAL)
description: Tests generated code using Qwen 32B (Local) - REAL execution

body.prompt: You are a code QA expert. Review the following GDScript code for bugs, syntax errors, and logic issues. Output ONLY JSON (no markdown): {"test_date": "2026-03-21", "overall_status": "PASS or FAIL", "bugs": [{"id": "BUG-001", "severity": "critical|high|medium|low", "location": "function name", "description": "what is wrong", "fix_suggestion": "how to fix"}], "warnings": [{"id": "WARN-001", "location": "...", "message": "..."}], "test_coverage_percent": 85, "notes": "Overall assessment"}. Sample GDScript provided for testing - even if it's a stub, provide realistic QA feedback. Start immediately with JSON.
